name: minecraft-1.21.11-fastest-clear-personalized
description: Best personalized fast-clear strategy for Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.11 normal difficulty, no keepinventory

routes.name: Pre-verified Set Seed Execution
routes.theme: Fast, stable, beginner-friendly solo full completion for Minecraft Java 1.21.11
routes.summary: Choose a known good 1.21.11 seed ahead of time, then execute a fixed, repeatable village-to-Nether-to-End plan with minimal world-search variance.
routes.note: Primary candidate because the user allows chosen seeds and wants fast, stable, realistically executable completion.
routes.decisionReason: Best balance of speed, stability, and low cognitive load for a beginner-to-intermediate solo player who can choose a seed; current-version evidence shows a strong representative set-seed clear and the route eliminates random-seed restart variance.
routes.evidence: Speedrun.com category split between Random Seed and Set Seed; 1.21.11 set-seed run example at 19:13; known-good seed/article evidence for close village / portal / trial chamber style opener.
routes.generationNote: Depth-2 dragon-fight finish family generated and evaluated under pre-verified set-seed execution.

routes.name: Practice-First Calibration
routes.theme: Fast, stable, beginner-friendly solo full completion for Minecraft Java 1.21.11
routes.summary: Spend minimal test time to measure the player’s actual combat, movement, Nether navigation, and End-fight comfort, then lock in the safest fast route that fits the measured skill.
routes.note: Meta-route that exists because the user explicitly requested skill to be measured rather than assumed.
routes.decisionReason: Skill uncertainty is explicit in the intake, and the user requested tests; a short calibration branch is valuable because it can prevent wasting a full run on mechanics the player has not yet proven.
routes.evidence: User requested skill be measured through tests rather than guessed; goal prioritizes realistic executability and prefers a slower route over a faster but too-hard one.
routes.generationNote: Depth-1 sibling family selected; defer depth-2 expansion until the parent strategist advances the cycle.

routes.name: Seed-Map Scout-and-Set
routes.theme: Fast, stable, beginner-friendly solo full completion for Minecraft Java 1.21.11
routes.summary: Use external seed maps / structure finders to scout and select a custom world with favorable spawn, structure proximity, and a simpler route before starting the real run.
routes.note: Relevant because external scouting is allowed and may tailor the route to the user; setup time is outside the run but complexity still matters.
routes.decisionReason: External seed-map scouting is allowed and can tailor the world further, but it adds setup overhead and only beats a pre-verified seed if the improvement is substantial.
routes.evidence: Chunk Base Seed Map supports structure scouting; seed-map docs note accuracy/coverage limits; pre-verified seed already has strong current-version speed evidence.
routes.generationNote: Depth-1 sibling family selected; defer depth-2 expansion until the parent strategist advances the cycle.

routes.name: Random-Seed Scout-Heavy
routes.theme: Fast, stable, beginner-friendly solo full completion for Minecraft Java 1.21.11
routes.summary: Use random-seed worlds, restarting and scouting aggressively for a good opening, then adapt the route to the found terrain and structures.
routes.note: Baseline fallback family, but likely too slow and too volatile for a first-attempt beginner-focused clear.
routes.decisionReason: Random-seed scout-heavy is dominated at depth 1 for this user because the user may choose a seed, and current-version evidence shows random-seed runs are much slower and more volatile than seeded alternatives.
routes.evidence: Speedrun.com category split between Random Seed and Set Seed; 1.21.11 random-seed run example around 51:52; user preference for fast, stable, realistically executable strategy.
routes.generationNote: Killed at depth 1; no further expansion.

routes.name: Hybrid Bow-Then-Bed Finish
routes.theme: Fast, stable, beginner-friendly solo full completion for Minecraft Java 1.21.11
routes.category: Depth 2 dragon-fight finish families inside pre-verified set-seed execution
routes.summary: Use bow damage as the default and reserve one or two controlled bed explosions only for the final perch or a low-health threshold.
routes.note: A middle ground that can reduce bed risk while retaining most of the bed route’s speed advantage.
routes.decisionReason: Best speed/reliability compromise for a first serious clear inside a set-seed opener: retains bow fallback while preserving most bed speed.
routes.evidence: Dragon health 200 HP; bed explosions can remove up to 1/4 of dragon health; user skill is still uncertain, so hybrid reduces reset risk versus pure bed.

routes.name: Shielded Bed Finish
routes.theme: Fast, stable, beginner-friendly solo full completion for Minecraft Java 1.21.11
routes.category: Depth 2 dragon-fight finish families inside pre-verified set-seed execution
routes.summary: Use beds as the primary End damage source, but standardize a blast-shield placement pattern so the user can survive the detonation more reliably.
routes.note: Balancing speed and safety by keeping the bed core while adding a repeatable protection layout.
routes.decisionReason: Shielded bed finish keeps bed speed while lowering self-kill risk, a strong secondary option if the user can memorize a shield pattern.
routes.evidence: Bed explosions are high-damage but risky; shielded setup reduces blast exposure relative to all-in beds.

routes.name: Bow-and-Melee Finish
routes.theme: Fast, stable, beginner-friendly solo full completion for Minecraft Java 1.21.11
routes.category: Depth 2 dragon-fight finish families inside pre-verified set-seed execution
routes.summary: Avoid bed detonations and finish the dragon with arrows while airborne plus melee on perch, favoring simplicity and low self-kill risk.
routes.note: Slower, but likely the most forgiving execution route for an untested player.
routes.decisionReason: Too slow for this parent route unless bed-based execution proves impossible; bow/melee adds several fight cycles and cumulative risk.
routes.evidence: Pure bow/melee requires many more hits to remove 200 HP than bed-based finishes; search guidance stresses beds are far more damage-efficient.

routes.name: Fast Bed Finish
routes.theme: Fast, stable, beginner-friendly solo full completion for Minecraft Java 1.21.11
routes.category: Depth 2 dragon-fight finish families inside pre-verified set-seed execution
routes.summary: Prioritize the quickest plausible bed-based dragon finish with minimal shielding or contingency, aiming for the fewest perches and least downtime.
routes.note: Best raw time if the user can already time beds and manage health confidently.
routes.decisionReason: Fast bed is the highest raw-speed option, but for an unmeasured player it is too fragile and reset-prone.
routes.evidence: Search guidance explicitly frames bed detonations as high-risk; a single misplacement can kill the player and waste the run.
